name: S-16 (SS-121)
events: 8 Aug 1942 USS S-16 departed the Panama Canal Zone for New London, Connecticut.
2 Oct 1942 USS S-16 departed New London, Connecticut for Casco Bay, Maine.
3 Oct 1942 USS S-16 arrived at Casco Bay, Maine from New London, Connecticut.
14 Nov 1942 USS S-16 departed Casco Bay, Maine for New London, Connecticut.
15 Nov 1942 USS S-16 arrived at New London, Connecticut from Casco Bay, Maine.
19 Nov 1942 USS S-16 departed New London, Connecticut for the Philadelphia Navy Yard for a refit.
21 Nov 1942 USS S-16 arrived at the Philadelphia Navy Yard from New London, Connecticut for a period of repairs and refit.
3 Feb 1943 Having completed her refit, USS S-16, arrived at New London, Connecticut from the Philadelphia Navy Yard.
26 Feb 1943 USS S-16 departed New London, Connecticut for Casco Bay, Maine.
27 Feb 1943 USS S-16 arrived at Casco Bay, Maine from New London, Connecticut.
11 Apr 1943 USS S-16 departed Casco Bay, Maine for New London, Connecticut.
12 Apr 1943 USS S-16 arrived at New London, Connecticut from Casco Bay, Maine.
23 May 1943 USS S-16 departed Casco Bay, Maine for New London, Connecticut.
24 May 1943 USS S-16 arrived at New London, Connecticut from Casco Bay, Maine.
6 Sep 1943 USS S-16 departed New London, Connecticut for Casco Bay, Maine.
7 Sep 1943 USS S-16 arrived at Casco Bay, Maine from New London, Connecticut.
24 Oct 1943 USS S-16 departed Casco Bay, Maine for New London, Connecticut.
25 Oct 1943 USS S-16 arrived at New London, Connecticut from Casco Bay, Maine.
